Security Check: Provider param validated against whitelist (not arbitrary OAuth provider); state param present (CSRF); HTTPS enforced; redirect_uri validated; no provider credentials in response
Functional Check: OAuth flow initiates with correct provider; state param round-trips correctly; unsupported provider returns 400
Notes: 🔴 Validate [provider] against strict whitelist — arbitrary OAuth provider injection must be blocked

Security Check: state param verified (CSRF protection); code exchanged server-side only; tokens not exposed to client; session cookie Secure+HttpOnly+SameSite; provider param whitelisted
Functional Check: OAuth callback processes correctly; session created; redirect to correct post-login page; invalid state returns 400; invalid code returns 401
Notes: 🔴 state param must be verified server-side — missing check = CSRF on OAuth flow

Perf Check: Response < 500ms; OTP generation fast; email/SMS delivery async
Security Check: Rate limiting: max 3 OTP requests per email per 15min; email validated before sending; OTP not returned in response body; OTP hashed in storage; no user enumeration via timing
Functional Check: OTP email/SMS delivered; OTP expires after N minutes; resend throttling works; invalid email returns 400 not 500
Notes: 🔴 Rate limit is critical — test rapid-fire OTP requests; verify OTP not exposed in response body

Perf Check: Response < 200ms; constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks
Security Check: OTP compared with constant-time algorithm (no timing attack); max 5 attempts then lockout; OTP single-use (invalidated after use); session created with Secure+HttpOnly+SameSite cookie; expired OTP rejected
Functional Check: Valid OTP → session created + redirect; invalid OTP → 401 with attempt count; expired OTP → 401 with expiry message; 6th attempt → lockout
Notes: 🔴 Verify constant-time OTP comparison; confirm OTP is invalidated after first successful use
